name: Carrot Sandwich Spread
recipeInstructions:
1. Extract juice from the carrots and reserve 2/3 cup of juice and 1 cup of pulp.
2. Whisk together the carrot juice and tahini until well blended.
3. Mix the mixture with the pulp and remaining ingredients.
4. Spread generously on whole grain toast and top with lettuce.
Per serving (spread only):
- 257 calories
- 5g protein
- 207mg sodium
- 12g carbohydrates
- 11g fat
- 0mg cholesterol
- 126mg calcium
Vegetarian Gourmet, Summer 1993/MM by DEEANNE
